metadata.title: KEV-Remediate Automation Rule — Wire Sentinel incident to remediation playbook
metadata.description: Creates a Sentinel automation rule that triggers the KEV-Remediate Logic App whenever the CISA KEV analytics rule creates a new incident. Deploy AFTER the analytics rule and Logic App are in place.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace with Sentinel enabled.
Full resource ID of the KEV-Remediate Logic App. Format: /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.Logic/workflows/KEV-Remediate
Optional: Resource ID of the CISA KEV analytics rule. If empty, the automation rule triggers on all incidents with 'CISA KEV' in the title.

properties.displayName: KEV-Remediate: Auto-trigger remediation on KEV incident
properties.description: When a CISA KEV analytics rule creates a new incident, automatically run the KEV-Remediate playbook to push an expedited WUfB deployment (for Windows KBs) or create an MDE remediation task (for third-party CVEs).
